purpose: Editable benchmark used ONLY by the estimator's 'Average Market Price' pricing rung. The app multiplies the matching rate by the project's square footage. This file does NOT feed compute_engine, the pricing DB, or any cost calculation. Refresh the numbers here quarterly; nothing else needs to change.
source: HomeBlue Wausau deck cost (PT $16-19/sf, composite $32-34/sf installed, 2026); Homewyse / HomeGuide / Angi 2026 (deck stain $1.57-6.16/sf, deck refinish $3.00-8.87/sf). Figures are installed totals for a basic-to-mid deck including labor. CWDB scope (premium TimberTech, elaborate railing, stairs, demo, permits) can legitimately sit above a bare-deck market rate, so treat this rung as a sanity anchor, not a target.

rate_notes.stain: Re-stain / seal of existing deck, applied over stain_sf (floor + railing + stair surface actually coated).
rate_notes.resurface: Replace deck boards on an existing frame (boards + install, frame stays). Higher than a re-stain, lower than a full build.
rate_notes.new_build_wood_pt: Pressure-treated pine build, installed, over deck floor area.
rate_notes.new_build_wood_cedar: Cedar build, installed (between PT and composite; cedar pricing volatile per pricing-db note).
rate_notes.new_build_composite: Composite / TimberTech build, installed. Top of the Wausau composite range; premium AZEK collections can run higher.
